stemHtml: You are close to your stall buffet boundary and you encounter Severe turbulence. You need to deviate less than 5 NM from your originally cleared track. You are flying in NAT airspace and are unable to establish communications with ATC. What should be the procedure?

options.a: Turn with a maximum bank of 30 degrees and maintain 500 ft clearance.
options.b: Maintain track and descend as soon as possible maintaining 300 ft clearance.
options.d: You must fly the turbulence penetration speed as deviation is not permitted with no ATC clearance.
